User.title: User Profile
User.description: User account details, role, and transcription quota tracking

lastTranscribeDate.description: The date of the last transcription (YYYY-MM-DD)

role.description: User access tier role (admin or user)

totalTranscribes.description: Total transcriptions performed across all time

TranscriptionLog.title: Transcription Log
TranscriptionLog.description: Log of transcription events for analysis and limits

uid.description: User UID who requested the transcription

videoName.description: Name or identifier of the video/audio transcribed

duration.description: Duration of the media in seconds

engine.description: Engine used for transcription (e.g. Gemini, Whisper)

transcription_logs/{logId}.description: Activity logs of all media transcriptions
